description_long: This object consists of two potted plants placed on a square wooden platform. One plant is housed in a white, marble-textured cylindrical pot, while the other is in a classic terracotta pot with a rounded lip. Both plants have broad, green leaves and slender stems, with the foliage spreading outward in a symmetrical fashion. The soil in each pot is visible, and the terracotta pot appears to have a slightly larger plant. A white rectangular object, possibly a ruler or marker, lies diagonally across the wooden surface. The overall arrangement suggests a decorative or functional display, suitable for urban environments such as patios, sidewalks, or indoor communal spaces.
description: Two leafy potted plants, one in a white marble-textured pot and the other in a terracotta pot, are displayed on a wooden platform with a white rectangular object nearby.
description_view_0: Front view showing both potted plants side by side, with the white marble pot on the left and the terracotta pot on the right, and a white rectangular object in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view with the marble pot and plant more prominent on the left, the terracotta pot slightly behind, and the white object angled across the wooden surface.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the terracotta pot and plant in the foreground, with the marble pot and plant partially obscured behind.
description_view_3: Back view showing the foliage of both plants, with the terracotta pot on the left and the marble pot on the right, and minimal visibility of the white object.
